prose:
**Pyridine Fukui reactivity (computed)** — DFT tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**) using the chemkit `fukui-reactivity` task with the PySCF/Mulliken charge workflow, **gas phase** (`solvent: null`), parent charge 0 and multiplicity 1. The N−1 cation state used charge +1, multiplicity 2; the N+1 anion state used charge −1, multiplicity 2. Geometry: fixed user-supplied XYZ at `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/pyridine/pyridine.xyz` (not geometry-optimized by this task). Density fitting was not requested. Software version was not reported by the tool.

**Headline result:** most electrophilic site = atom 1 (N), **f+ = 0.48422572**. Most nucleophilic site = atom 4 (C), f− = 0.1182626.

Per-atom Fukui descriptors, atom labels as returned by chemkit:

| atom | element | f+ | f− | f0 | dual descriptor |
|---:|:---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| 1 | N | 0.48422572 | 0.064122671 | 0.27417419 | 0.42010305 |
| 2 | C | 0.32447225 | 0.0061877146 | 0.16532998 | 0.31828453 |
| 3 | C | 0.14032092 | 0.11823139 | 0.12927615 | 0.022089534 |
| 4 | C | 0.14039587 | 0.1182626 | 0.12932923 | 0.022133274 |
| 5 | C | 0.29962628 | 0.11206595 | 0.20584612 | 0.18756032 |
| 6 | C | 0.29947707 | 0.11200985 | 0.20574346 | 0.18746722 |
| 7 | H | -0.1415132 | 0.08284851 | -0.029332343 | -0.22436171 |
| 8 | H | -0.1336841 | 0.098179487 | -0.017752308 | -0.23186359 |
| 9 | H | -0.13365905 | 0.09818226 | -0.017738395 | -0.23184131 |
| 10 | H | -0.1398163 | 0.094960093 | -0.022428103 | -0.23477639 |
| 11 | H | -0.13984545 | 0.094949479 | -0.022447987 | -0.23479493 |

Warnings: no `warnings` array was reported by the tool. Integrity verdict: `trustworthy: true` (`status: ok`). Integrity check details returned by the tool: `sum(f+) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)`; `sum(f-) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)`; `common header present`.

Reproducibility: exact command returned by chemkit: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui --method dft --tier standard --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1 --accept-defaults /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/pyridine/pyridine.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpfoedhc34/live.json`. Plot written to `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/pyridine/argo_gpt-5.5/20260704-152902_pyridine_fukui_reactivity/agent_call_01_plot.png`. A live `.out` log path was required by the reporting standard, but this tool response did not return a `.out` path, so I am not inventing one.
